seo.title: Converters
seo.description: Data converters pattern for backend-to-frontend data transformation with strict typing and validation

header.title: Backend and Frontend Converters (Mappers)
header.description: Guide on decoupling API contracts and internal application data models using mappings (DTO -> Domain Model).

benefit_text: Converters isolate the UI from backend changes, allow data formatting (dates, enums), and guarantee layer-level type safety.

to_frontend.title: Mapping to Frontend (Domain Model)
to_frontend.description: Transforming raw backend data (snake_case, strings instead of dates) into camelCase and typed objects for the UI. <one>mapToFrontend</one> is the most critical stage.

to_backend.title: Mapping to Backend (DTO)
to_backend.description: Preparing data before sending. Used when creating or updating entities to return to the <one>DTO</one> format expected by the API.

filters.title: Filter Conversion
filters.description: A special case of mapping search filter state into <one>query parameters</one>. Allows convenient array joining, handling empty values, and API-specific formats.

rtk_query.title: RTK Query Integration
rtk_query.description: Converters are injected directly into endpoint definitions: <one>transformResponse</one> for data retrieval and <two>query</two> (params/body) for data submission.

converters.label: Converters:
converters.text: Located in the <one>converters/</one> folder. Files are named following the <two>[entity-name].converters.ts</two> pattern. They use types from the sibling folder for data transformation.

types.label: Types and Interfaces:
types.text: Located in the <one>types</one> folder. Must be divided into <two>*.backend.interface.ts</two> (raw DTOs) and <three>*.interface.ts</three> (UI models). All types are exported via <four>index.ts</four>.
